title: coffea boiviniana
intro: Coffea boiviniana, a species of coffee plant, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to Madagascar and the Comoros. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Coffea boiviniana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially exhibiting anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of Coffea boiviniana typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts that can be consumed orally or topically, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
